description.en: The historically older starting point of the Camino Inglés. Pilgrims arrived by sea at the port of A Coruña and walked inland to Santiago, joining the Ferrol path at Hospital de Bruma. The full A Coruña route is only ~75 km — below the 100 km Compostela minimum. Since December 2016, A Coruña pilgrims can qualify for the Compostela by combining their walk with at least 25 km on another connected Camino. v1 of open-pilgrimages ships this variant as a metadata stub; full geometry, stages, and waypoints are planned for a future release.

sources.name: OpenStreetMap
sources.notes: Camiño Inglés (rutas alternativas) — historic A Coruña start path
